# Poliklinika Jelovac / Polyclinic Jelovac

> A private medical clinic in Tinjan, Istria, Croatia, specialising in early diagnostics and prevention of malignant diseases through ultrasound, colour Doppler, and cytological diagnostics.

## About

Poliklinika Jelovac is run by dr. med. Nedjeljko Jelovac and has been operating since 1991. The clinic specialises in detecting very small tumour formations (from 3 mm) using ultrasound-guided puncture and cytological (microscopic) diagnosis. The goal is to identify and treat disease at the earliest stage, when outcomes are most successful.

Services include:
- Ultrasound diagnostics (abdominal, breast)
- Colour Doppler vascular diagnostics
- Cytological diagnostics via ultrasound-guided puncture
- Systematic preventive check-ups (clinical examination, ECG, laboratory, ultrasound)
- General medicine and specialist consultations
